calendar.matters:
MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Brendan Joy, Esq. 626-390-0441 Employee Advocates for Plaintiff.
Jonathan Kim, Esq. 415-788-1900 Murphy Pearson Bradley Feeny for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Mr. Kim contests and presents arguments. Plaintiff has not pled prayer for punitive damages sufficiently; bigger picture, no suppporting facts, cites the lunchen, misconduct on basis of sex, no actula complaint lodged.
Mr. Joy responds. Complaint must be liberally construed; sex discrimination, retaliatio and termination, irreleant, false, improper, despicable conduct, puntives properly pled.
The Court comments and poses questions.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, the court signs an order. (see scanned order for details)***

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Aug-12-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
